ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-10-2020 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-27-2020 Continued To Feb-10-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ciarin O'Sullivan for Petitioner.

Mr. O'Sullivan stated that he was out for three months and that he filed a petition to terminate the estate on Friday. Status on close of estate is continued to February 10, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Anasse. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or Further Status Report
Off Calendar Aug-08-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or Further Status Report
Off Calendar Jul-25-2018 Continued To Aug-08-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ciaran O'Sullivan for and with Annie Robertson (Petitioner)

Mr. O'Sullivan apologized for missing the last hearing date due to a calendaring error, and stated that they are waiting for an ancillary probate in Hong Kong, which has been a bureaucratic nightmare. Mr. O'Sullivan requested the status report be approved for more months, that he expects nothing will happen with Hong Kong case in the next few months, and that this is a modest size estate. The Court instructed Mr. O'Sullivan to file a status report and make the request for 6 months in his status report. The Order to Appear is off calendar. The status on close of estate is continued to August 8, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jul-25-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or Further Status Report
Off Calendar Jul-11-2018 Continued To Jul-25-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on July 25, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why a Petition for Final Distribution or further Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Charlene Kiesselbach. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-25-2017 Continued To Aug-29-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ciarin O'Sullivan for Annie Robertson (Petitioner).

Mr. O'Sullivan stated that he is not in a position to file an inventory and appraisal, that this is an unusual case, that it was opened to give his Client power to open an ancillary probate in Hong Kong, that he had to have the letters re-issued because of all of the "also known as" names which he attempted to do by way of an ex parte petition and that he was told he has to amend the petition. Status on close of the estate is continued to August 29, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to file a petition for approval of report on status of administration.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
